arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains decision to leave Marcus Rashford out of Manchester United squad against Tottenham
arts.sum: Rashford has once again not been named in the Man United squad

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains Marcus Rashford's absence against Tottenham as Man United star is LEFT OUT of squad for second straight game
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has explained why Marcus Rashford was excluded from Man United's squad for the second time in a row against Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Why Marcus Rashford is still absent from Manchester United squad vs Tottenham
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford is missing from the Man Utd squad again and his absence isn't due to injury or illness.

arts.ttl: Team News: Man United XI for Tottenham showdown in EFL Cup revealed as Alejandro Garnacho, Marcus Rashford decisions made
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim confirms his starting side for Thursday's EFL Cup quarter-final with Tottenham Hotspur in North London.

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho returns to Man United bench for Carabao Cup quarter-final against Tottenham after being dropped for derby win at City as Marcus Rashford misses out again
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho has returned to Ruben Amorim's matchday squad after being omitted against Man City on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup semi-final draw LIVE: Man Utd battle for spot as Arsenal and Liverpool wait
arts.sum: The Carabao Cup semi-final matches will be decided tonight following Manchester United's clash against Tottenham, with Arsenal, Liverpool and Newcastle awaiting their opponents

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup semi-final draw LIVE: Liverpool, Arsenal, Newcastle await fate after Tottenham v Manchester United
arts.sum: The semi-final draw will follow the remaining quarter-final between Tottenham and Manchester United

arts.ttl: Man Utd slash stewards' £100 bonus in latest costcutting measures
arts.sum: A former Manchester United steward has revealed that Sir Jim Ratcliffe's costcutting exercises have caused him and many other long-serving employees to quit the club

arts.ttl: 'Certainly': Celtic player who Ange Postecoglou knows well could sign for Tottenham in January – journalist
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has a history of signing players he knows well. The Australian signed a number of J-League players during his time at Celtic, and...

arts.ttl: Report: £30m player actually walked away from talks with Manchester City in favour of Tottenham
